title: pinus decandolleana var. dependens
intro: Pinus decandolleana var. dependens, also known as white pine or five-needle pine, is a species of evergreen tree native to East Asia, characterized by its long, flexible needles and cylindrical cones. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pinus decandolleana var. dependens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
